body:
## What's Changed
* chore: use native addAbortListener by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5021
* fix: fix the logic for the UNDICI_NO_WASM_SIMD environment variable by @ShenHongFei in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5026
* fix(http2): send body for non-expectsPayload methods with content by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5030
* fix(fetch): correct 'navigator' typo to 'navigate' in fetchFinale by @deepview-autofix in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5044
* fix(webidl): correct signed integer bounds in ConvertToInt by @deepview-autofix in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5038
* fix(fetch): use || for CRLF check in multipart formdata-parser by @deepview-autofix in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5049
* fix(websocket): correct argument order in WebSocketStream UTF-8 failure by @deepview-autofix in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5050
* fix(pool): propagate useH2c to connector when connections > 1 by @SAY-5 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5031
* fix(cache): return immutable staleAt in milliseconds by @deepview-autofix in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5048
* fix(socks5-proxy-agent): use per-origin pools to prevent cross-origin routing by @deepview-autofix in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5041
* fix(cache): evict oldest entries first in SqliteCacheStore prune by @deepview-autofix in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5039
* fix(socks5): correctly expand IPv6 '::' compressed notation by @deepview-autofix in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5046
* Remove unused func and unnecessary shim by @tsctx in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5053
* fix: reject malformed content-length request headers by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5060
* fix(request): reject NaN highWaterMark during option validation by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5062
* docs: fix broken links in docsify sidebar by @maruthang in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5065
* fix(fetch): prefer filename* over filename in multipart form-data by @maruthang in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5068
* fix(http2): reject websocket upgrades on non-200 responses by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5072
* feat: support username-only proxy authentication in ProxyAgent by @rossilor95 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4935
* build(deps): bump uWebSockets.js from v20.58.0 to v20.64.0 in /benchmarks by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5083
* fix(client-h2): stop double-decrementing kOpenStreams on stream timeout by @SAY-5 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5076
* fix(http2): reject upgrade streams closed before response headers by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5069
* fix(http2): allow GET and HEAD request bodies over h2 by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5058
* fix(cache): include query in cache key when opts.path is undefined by @maruthang in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5081
* fix: avoid premature cleanup of dispatcher in Agent by @bienzaaron in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5034
* fix(http2): record ping failures on the socket by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5075
* add undici security policy by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5056
* fix(mock): make filterCalls AND operator actually intersect results by @deepview-autofix in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5045
* fix(socks5): enforce authenticated state before CONNECT by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5097
* fix(cache): skip expired sqlite vary entries during lookup by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5095
* fix: enforce maxCachedSessions in TLS session cache by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5102
* fix(socks5): encode embedded IPv4 tails in IPv6 literals correctly by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5099
* fix: handle invalid HTTP/2 connection headers (#4356) by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5101
* fix(interceptor): add throwOnMaxRedirect to types and interceptor opts by @maruthang in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5066
* fix(websocket): avoid double-closing canceled stream readers by @colinaaa in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5105
* fix(cache): persist vary when updating sqlite cache entries by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5109
* refactor(h1): track HEAD keep-alive override as boolean by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5110
* client: cache llhttp wasm buffer view by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5115
* deps: update llhttp to 9.3.1 by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5113
* fix(http2): preserve accepted streams after GOAWAY by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5090
* fix: reuse parser WeakRef for timeout callbacks by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5125
* fix: stop buffering data after SOCKS5 connect by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5118
* perf(http2): avoid response header reserialization by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5085
* fix(cache): enforce sqlite maxCount after insert by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5112
* perf: reduce EventSourceStream parser allocations by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5032
* types(dispatcher): use OutgoingHttpHeaders for request headers by @maruthang in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5067
* cleanup: delete redundant .gitkeep file by @shivarm in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5133
* fix(http2): respect peer max concurrent streams by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5135
* test(http2): ensure websocket upgrade resumes queued requests by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5132
* test(mock): cover SnapshotAgent excludeUrls playback by @maruthang in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5080
* perf(client): parse h1 content-length statelessly by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5124
* perf(http2): reduce writeH2 per-request callback allocations by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5138
* chore(deps): add lockfile by @aduh95 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5139
* perf: use byteLength property for binary body chunks by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5126
* fix(cache): allow streamed entries at maxEntrySize limit by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5129
* perf(http2): avoid cloning headers when removing status by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5127
* fix: validate H2CClient maxConcurrentStreams option by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5143
* perf: avoid redundant scans in BalancedPool dispatcher selection by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5146
* fix: replace stale pool clients under connection limit by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5145

## New Contributors
* @deepview-autofix made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5044
* @SAY-5 made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5031
* @maruthang made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5065
* @bienzaaron made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5034

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v8.1.0...v8.2.0

## What's Changed
* feat: add configurable maxPayloadSize for WebSocket by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4955


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v8.0.3...v8.1.0

## What's Changed
* docs: add an Undici 7 to 8 migration guide by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4963
* chore: switch deferred promise with Promise.withResolvers() by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4972
* chore: remove zstd and markAsUncloneable feature probes by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4968
* test: remove obsolete nodeMajor/nodeMinor util exports by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4976
* chore: use Promise.withResolvers in SOCKS5 proxy agent by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4978
* build(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.27.7 to 0.28.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4985
* build(deps-dev): bump proxy from 2.2.0 to 4.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4987
* build(deps): bump got from 14.6.6 to 15.0.0 in /benchmarks by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4988
* chore: use Object.hasOwn for iterator checks by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4979
* doc: Update `dump({ limit: Integer })` default value by @samuel871211 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4981
* fix: avoid 401 failures for stream-backed request bodies by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4941
* test: remove unsupported Node version checks from fetch tests by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4977
* types: remove legacy AbortSignal alias now provided by @types/node by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4995
* fix: remove stale constructor interceptors from types and pool options by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4994
* doc: update incorrect description of `dump.maxSize` by @samuel871211 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4982
* ci: enable coverage for node.js 25 by @shivarm in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4980
* refactor: reuse wrapRequestBody in RedirectHandler by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4992
* fix: preserve connect option in H2CClient by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5000
* types: document Client and H2CClient option declarations by @trivikr in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4998
* fix: native WebSocket over H2 server after undici import by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4990
* chore(test): issue 3969 by @rozzilla in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5005
* fix(1270): throw descriptive error when opts.dispatcher–passed instance methods by @rozzilla in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5007
* docs: Change the default value of allowH2 in JSDoc by @7hokerz in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5009
* chore(test): cover issue 5014 by @rozzilla in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5015
* fix: prevent cache dedup key collision via unescaped delimiters by @eddieran in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5013
* fix(proxy agent): respect connectTimeout by @rozzilla in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5011

## New Contributors
* @7hokerz made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5009
* @eddieran made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5013

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v8.0.2...v8.0.3

## What's Changed
* fix: backport 401 stream-backed body fix to v7.x by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/5006


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v7.24.7...v7.24.8

## What's Changed
* fix(websocket): fallback to HTTP/1.1 when H2 CONNECT is unavailable by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4966
* fix: release ref by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4965
* ci: reenable shared builtin CI tests by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4967


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v8.0.1...v8.0.2

## What's Changed
* Remove legacy handler wrappers by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4786
* fix: isolate global dispatcher v2 and add Dispatcher1Wrapper bridge by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4827
* fix: preserve request statusText and update h2 dispatch tests by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4830
* feat!: enable h2 by default by @metcoder95 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4828
* fix(cache): preserve short-lived entries for revalidation by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4934
* fix: remove support for non-real Blob objects by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4937
* build(deps): bump github/codeql-action from 4.32.3 to 4.35.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4953
* Undici 8 by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4916
* build(deps): bump hendrikmuhs/ccache-action from 1.2.19 to 1.2.22 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4954
* doc: remove duplicate listItem of RetryHandler.md & RetryHandler.md by @samuel871211 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4948
* fix: mirror the legacy global dispatcher for built-in fetch by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4962
* fix(websocket/stream): only enqueue parsed messages in WebSocketStream by @colinaaa in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4959

## New Contributors
* @colinaaa made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4959

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v7.24.7...v8.0.1

## What's Changed
* Remove legacy handler wrappers by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4786
* fix: isolate global dispatcher v2 and add Dispatcher1Wrapper bridge by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4827
* fix: preserve request statusText and update h2 dispatch tests by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4830
* feat!: enable h2 by default by @metcoder95 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4828
* fix(cache): preserve short-lived entries for revalidation by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4934
* fix: remove support for non-real Blob objects by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4937
* build(deps): bump github/codeql-action from 4.32.3 to 4.35.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4953
* Undici 8 by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4916


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v7.24.7...v8.0.0

## What's Changed
* docs: update broken links in file "Dispatcher.md" by @samuel871211 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4924
* doc: remove unused parameter `redirectionLimitReached` by @samuel871211 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4933
* test: skip flaky macOS Node 20 cookie fetch cases by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4932
* fix(types): align Response with DOM fetch types by @theamodhshetty in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4867
* fix(types): Fix clone method type declaration to be an instance method rather than instance property by @mistval in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4925
* test: skip IPv6 tests when IPv6 is not available by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4939
* fix: correctly handle multi-value rawHeaders in fetch by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4938
* ignore AGENTS.md by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4942

## New Contributors
* @samuel871211 made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4924
* @mistval made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4925

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v7.24.6...v7.24.7

## What's Changed
* fix(test): client wasm compatible with clang 22 by @rozzilla in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4909
* fix(mock): improve error message when intercepts are exhausted by @travisbreaks in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4912
* fix(websocket): support open diagnostics over h2 by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4921
* fix: assume http/https scheme for scheme-less proxy env vars by @travisbreaks in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4914
* fix(cache): check Authorization on request headers per RFC 9111 §3.5 by @metalix2 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4911
* fix: wrap kConnector call in try/catch to prevent client hang by @veeceey in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4834
* docs: clarify fetch and FormData pairing by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4922
* fix: support Connection header with connection-specific header names per RFC 7230 by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4775
* fix: avoid prototype collisions in parseHeaders by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4923
* build(deps-dev): bump typescript from 5.9.3 to 6.0.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4926
* test: auto-init WPT submodule by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4930

## New Contributors
* @rozzilla made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4909
* @veeceey made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4834

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v7.24.5...v7.24.6

## What's Changed
* Formdata tests by @KhafraDev in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4902
* test: add unexpected disconnect guards to more client test files by @samayer12 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4844
* fix(cache): only apply 1-year deleteAt for immutable responses by @metalix2 in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4913

## New Contributors
* @metalix2 made their first contribution in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4913

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v7.24.4...v7.24.5

## What's Changed
* fix(fetch): handle URL credentials in dispatch path extraction by @mcollina in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4892


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v7.24.3...v7.24.4

## What's Changed
* fix(h2): TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'push') i… by @hxinhan in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4881


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v7.24.2...v7.24.3

## What's Changed
* fix fetch path logic by @KhafraDev in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4890
* remove maxDecompressedMessageSize by @KhafraDev in https://github.com/nodejs/undici/pull/4891


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nodejs/undici/compare/v7.24.1...v7.24.2
